agents.name: orchestrator
agents.description: Routes user queries to appropriate specialist agents and decides turn order

agents.name: entity_extractor
agents.description: Extracts and normalizes entities (offerings, regions, services, customers) from the user query using synonym lookup

agents.name: outage_analyst
agents.description: Generates and executes T-SQL for outage/incident analysis: severity, TTM, QCO, CritSit distributions, RCA

agents.name: airo_analyst
agents.description: Generates and executes T-SQL for AIRO/AIROD impact metrics at fleet, region, and customer granularity

agents.name: customer_insights
agents.description: Customer impact analysis: CritSits per customer, AIRO by customer, QEI/QEIS lists, communication gaps

agents.name: visualizer
agents.description: Generates ready-to-run Streamlit visualization code from analytical datasets produced by other agents

agents.name: summarizer
agents.description: Consolidates all analysis results into a final structured response with headline, summary bullets, and datasets

agents.name: analyst_coordinator
agents.description: Invokes outage_analyst, airo_analyst, and customer_insights agents in parallel when the user explicitly requests all analysts to run concurrently

agents.name: investigation_orchestrator
agents.description: Routes investigation turns through phases: triage â†’ hypothesizing â†’ planning â†’ collecting â†’ reasoning â†’ acting â†’ notifying. Reads parsed signals and decides the next agent.

agents.name: triage_agent
agents.description: Classifies activated signals, extracts symptoms from config templates, and determines investigation category (CAT-HEALTH-DEGRADE, CAT-OUTAGE-IMPACT, CAT-PROACTIVE-RISK, CAT-SUPPORT-ESCALATION)

agents.name: sli_collector
agents.description: Collects and synthesizes SLI breach data (customer-specific, multi-customer, load patterns) for evidence evaluation

agents.name: incident_collector
agents.description: Collects and synthesizes incident/outage data and root cause analysis for evidence evaluation

agents.name: support_collector
agents.description: Collects and synthesizes support ticket data (customer-specific and cross-customer patterns) for evidence evaluation

agents.name: evidence_planner
agents.description: Plans and executes evidence collection for the current hypothesis by dispatching collector sub-agents in parallel, then consolidates their synthesized findings

agents.name: reasoner
agents.description: Evaluates collected evidence against the current hypothesis to determine CONFIRMED, CONTRIBUTING, REFUTED, or needs_more_evidence. Pure reasoning â€” no tools.

agents.name: action_planner
agents.description: Selects and prioritizes remediation actions from the action catalog for confirmed or contributing hypotheses. Pure reasoning â€” no tools, no execution.
